entry.title: Bybit Affiliate Program (How to Get 40% Lifetime Commission)
entry.content:
Bybit Affiliate Program (How to Get 40% Lifetime Commission)

Since its establishment in 2018, Bybit has emerged as a trusted ally for cryptocurrency enthusiasts and traders alike, earning the title of "The most reliable cryptocurrency exchange." This reputable platform has not only solidified its presence but has also risen to prominence within the industry.

Google Trends confirms Bybit's increasing popularity, surpassing established platforms like Etoro in affiliate program interest, as highlighted in a recent Etoro Affiliate Program Review. This surge reflects the growing significance and relevance of Bybit in the ever-evolving cryptocurrency exchange landscape.

What is Bybit Affiliate Program?

Bybit's Affiliate Program isn't just a pathway for bloggers, influencers, and content creators; it's an opportunity to earn substantial commissions from transaction fees.

Affiliates can enjoy lifetime commissions of up to an impressive 40%, covering spots, futures, and options trading.

Real-time calculations ensure transparency in earnings.

What truly distinguishes Bybit is its commitment to supporting its affiliates. A dedicated account manager is on hand to offer unwavering support, assisting with marketing strategies and technical inquiries.

And the best part?

There's no upfront cost to join, making it an accessible and potentially highly rewarding opportunity in the cryptocurrency realm.

Bybit Application Process

Getting started with this affiliate journey is simple.

Just head over to affiliates.bybit.com and click on the "Apply" button. You'll encounter a brief questionnaire that explores your background and plans for promoting Bybit.

Sharing your social media accounts, such as Twitter or YouTube, during the application process is recommended.

Within three to five working days, an affiliate manager will review your application against specific criteria.

Once approved, you're officially part of the Bybit Affiliate Program.

The Pros and Cons of The Bybit Affiliate Program

Pros:

Lucrative Commission Structure: Maximize your earning potential with commissions reaching up to 40% on trading fees, featuring tiered rates that increase with trading volumes.

Compelling Conversion Rates: Bybit's renowned user-friendly interface not only facilitates seamless trading but also enhances conversion rates for affiliates.

Precise Commission Crediting: Gain peace of mind with an accurate and dependable tracking system, ensuring commissions are credited with precision.

Diverse Marketing Toolkit: Strengthen your promotions with a wide array of marketing materials, including banners, links, widgets, and landing pages.

Effortless Daily Payouts: Enjoy the convenience of withdrawing your earnings daily by UTC 04:00, ensuring swift access to your hard-earned rewards.

Cons:

Geographical Participation Restrictions: Residents of certain countries, including Canada, Iran, Mainland China, and the United States, are restricted from participating.

Challenges in Reaching Maximum Commissions: Affiliates without a significant following or trading volume may encounter difficulties in attaining the highest commission rates.

Uncertainty Surrounding Cookie Duration: The program currently lacks clarity on cookie duration, leading to uncertainties in tracking aspects.

How to Sign Up Bybit Affiliate Program

To join Bybit’s affiliate marketing program, you need to create a Bybit account using the referral code 62545. This step is crucial to increase your commission to 40%.

Here are the steps to follow:

1. Sign up for the affiliate marketing program on Bybit’s official website: [https://affiliates.bybit.com/v2/en-US/](https://affiliates.bybit.com/v2/en-US/)

2. Log in to your Bybit account and copy your account UID.

3. Register to elevate your commission level to 40% by filling out the partner registration form: [https://forms.gle/Z8KrEcw4WC9QgKtd7](https://forms.gle/Z8KrEcw4WC9QgKtd7)

What Are The Commissions and Payouts?

Affiliates stand to gain significant rewards, with commissions soaring up to 40% on transactions.

Furthermore, there's an extra 10% bonus when referred users transition into affiliates themselves.

But it doesn't end there; affiliates also receive a 5% commission on other products.

Daily commission distribution, finalized by 4 AM UTC, guarantees affiliates prompt access to their earnings.

Payouts, conducted in digital currencies, offer flexibility and convenience to affiliates as they receive their rewards.

Tips to Succeed in the Bybit Affiliate Program

Craft Compelling Content for Bybit

In the realm of affiliate marketing, the content you create holds immense significance. To effectively promote Bybit's offerings, it's imperative to generate content that not only grabs the attention of your audience but also keeps them engaged. Here's how you can achieve that:

1. Understand Your Audience: Take the time to comprehend your audience's interests, passions, and pain points. This understanding will enable you to produce content that resonates with them and addresses their needs effectively.

2. Showcase the Products: Use high-quality images and videos to showcase Bybit's products. If possible, try using the products yourself. This firsthand experience will add credibility to your content and showcase your expertise to your audience.

3. Share Personal Experiences: Personal anecdotes often strike a chord with people. Share your own experiences with Bybit's products, detailing how they resolved your issues or fulfilled your requirements. This personal touch will help your audience connect better with the products.

4. Provide Value: Offer insightful reviews, practical advice, or step-by-step guides related to Bybit's affiliate offerings. This not only promotes the products but also establishes you as a knowledgeable authority in your niche.

5. Engage with Your Audience: Encourage your audience to engage by leaving comments, asking questions, or sharing their own experiences with Bybit. Fostering this interaction creates a sense of community and boosts engagement with your content.

Analyzing and Understanding Your Affiliate Data with Bybit

Bybit provides valuable insights into your referrals, conversions, and earnings, which are essential for success in affiliate marketing. Your ability to interpret and analyze this data effectively is crucial for maximizing your earnings.

Here's how you can leverage your affiliate data effectively:

1. Track Your Performance: Monitor all your affiliate links in one central location to gain detailed insights into click-through rates, conversions, and overall earnings, giving you a comprehensive view of your performance.

2. Understand Your Earnings: Easily identify which of your content is generating the most earnings. This knowledge helps you understand what resonates best with your audience and drives conversions.

3. Identify Improvement Opportunities: Identify any underperforming content and refine it for better results. This might involve refining keyword targeting or adjusting the placement of affiliate links to enhance effectiveness.

4. Optimize Your Strategy: Analyzing performance not only sheds light on your current efforts but also guides your future strategies. By recognizing what works well, you can replicate successful tactics in your future content, ensuring ongoing success in your affiliate marketing endeavors.

Click here to discover More >>>

Disclaimer: This is an educational article. We do not provide financial advice. Always do your own research before investing.

Disclosure: This article contains affiliate links. We may receive commission if you sign up through our links.

entry.title: Re: Dedicated instances in CAP project
entry.content:
I do this by deploying same CAP project as multiple CF apps.

Apps are the unit for resource scaling in Cloud foundry. But one is not restricted in deploying one CAP project (or any other application package) in one CF app. If you deploy multiple apps with the same application package they are indistinguishable (mostly) from multiple instances of the same app if one were to bind the same services. But, now one gets to scale these deployments individually.

When starting CAP server (node.js) you can configure which services are started. It is straight forward to start only one service with a command line argument.  

Even though it is normal to route hosts to apps, CF routes also allow to route path to apps. 

You can create one mtar file with multiple CF apps using the same package, so that the mtar file size does not explode. 

See: How to scale a microservice by deploying it in multiple apps.
